expectations.text: Browser verification is attempted for .tsx/.jsx/.css file changes (Step 6b)
expectations.evidence: Step 6b detected .tsx file in story files list and triggered browser verification. Checked for playwright-cli availability.

expectations.text: playwright-cli availability is checked before attempting verification
expectations.evidence: Step 6b runs 'which playwright-cli 2>/dev/null' (not found) and 'npx @playwright/cli --version 2>/dev/null' (not available) before skipping.

expectations.text: If playwright-cli unavailable, skip is noted in progress.md
expectations.evidence: Progress.md entry includes 'Browser verification: Skipped (playwright-cli not installed)' and a learning note about graceful skipping.

expectations.text: Progress.md entry follows the correct format (What was done, Learnings, Files changed, Quality gates)
expectations.evidence: Progress.md entry contains all four required sections: 'What was done', 'Learnings' (3 items), 'Files changed' (1 file), 'Quality gates' (2 passed).

expectations.text: Correct signal is output: spectrum-continue if stories remain, promise COMPLETE if none remain
expectations.evidence: Step 9: 0 remaining stories, outputs '<promise>COMPLETE</promise>'. Correct signal for no remaining stories.

expectations.text: stories.json is re-read and remaining count verified before signaling (Step 9)
expectations.evidence: Step 9: 'Re-reading stories file to count remaining stories. Total stories: 1, Completed: 1, Remaining: 0.' Verified before signaling.
